title: C Values, Integer Conversions, and Size Arithmetic · Memory Trace: Size Ptrdiff Contract
summary: A binary record parser receives attacker-controlled counts that cross signedness and multiplication boundaries before allocation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem size ptrdiff contract increment in checked size and conversion policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use size_t for object sizes, ptrdiff_t for valid pointer differences, and guarded conversions at API boundaries.
Trace integer promotions and usual arithmetic conversions before comparing, shifting, indexing, or sizing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
